channel.title: Kai Sano Lim
channel.description: Recent content on Kai Sano Lim

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Kai Sano Lim

ksano.limo.int@gmail.com | (215) 206-3173 | linkedin.com/in/kai-s-lim | San Jose, CA

GLOBAL BUSINESS PERSPECTIVE | PHARMACEUTICAL MARKETING | CROSS-FUNCTIONAL OPERATIONS

Emerging international business professional with hands-on experience in pharmaceutical marketing, quality assurance (QA), and supply chain management. Focused on bridging cultural and functional gaps within international teams, delivering strategic insights through adaptability, strong interpersonal skills, and a collaborative mindset.

Areas of Expertise
✔ Marketing Best Practices ✔ Global Business Operations ✔ Business Process Optimization
✔ Regulatory Compliance ✔ Cross-Team Collaboration ✔ Vendor and Supplier Assessment
✔ Intercultural Communication ✔ Technical Communication ✔ International Cultural Competence

Education and Certification

Bachelor of Science in Business Administration: International Business — Global Operations Management San Jose State University (SJSU) | August 2021 – May 2026

item.title: About
item.description:
+++ date = ‘2026-06-24T23:31:39-07:00’ draft = false title = ‘About’ +++

Hey, I’m Kai 👋

I’m a 23-year-old recent graduate from San Jose State University, where I studied International Business with a specialization in Global Operations Management. My professional interests sit at the intersection of global logistics, supply chain systems, and marketing — fields where strategy meets execution on a world stage.

As you explore this site, you’ll find a collection of projects spanning internships, coursework, and elected leadership roles. Whether it’s building vendor evaluation frameworks, supporting pharmaceutical marketing campaigns, or coordinating cross-border logistics, I bring the same approach to everything: show up, learn fast, and add value.
